name: GridCsvExportApi
description: The CSV export API interface that is available in the grid [[apiRef]].

properties.name: exportDataAsCsv
properties.description: Downloads and exports a CSV of the grid's data.
properties.type: (options?: { delimiter?: string, fileName?: string, utf8WithBom?: boolean, includeHeaders?: boolean, includeColumnGroupsHeaders?: boolean, getRowsToExport?: (params: { apiRef: RefObject<GridApiCommunity> }) => GridRowId[], shouldAppendQuotes?: boolean, escapeFormulas?: boolean, fields?: string[], allColumns?: boolean }) => void

properties.name: getDataAsCsv
properties.description:
Returns the grid data as a CSV string.
This method is used internally by `exportDataAsCsv`.
properties.type: (options?: { delimiter?: string, fileName?: string, utf8WithBom?: boolean, includeHeaders?: boolean, includeColumnGroupsHeaders?: boolean, getRowsToExport?: (params: { apiRef: RefObject<GridApiCommunity> }) => GridRowId[], shouldAppendQuotes?: boolean, escapeFormulas?: boolean, fields?: string[], allColumns?: boolean }) => string
